_codex_staging.notes: Amgen transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Prior handoff found one official transcript PDF and third-party transcript coverage for other quarters. Structured StockAnalysis rows are included for all in-scope quarters pending direct official/fallback reconciliation.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.

coverage_summary.primary_structured_source: StockAnalysis transcript pages with mixed-source context
coverage_summary.official_source_context: Mixed official/third-party context; StockAnalysis structured fallback
